title: Smoky Canadian Tart
description: A savory tart filled with smoky flavor and a flaky crust, perfect for a satisfying meal. This recipe combines the best of Canadian ingredients with a delightful smoky twist.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Transfer pastry to a 9-inch (23 cm) tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a small bowl, mix together smoked cheese, floral honey, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Arrange Canadian bacon slices in a single layer on the pastry, leaving a 1-inch (2.5 cm) border around the edges.
Spread the cheese mixture evenly over the bacon.
Roll out tart pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Use a pastry cutter or a knife to create a decorative edge around the tart.
Place the tart pastry over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the top of the tart with a little water and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
